name: Symbol.SymbolAttributes
summary: The SymbolAttributes class contains the attributes for the symbol.

constructors.name: Symbol.SymbolAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a new default symbol attributes instance that loads standard attributes.

constructors.name: Symbol.SymbolAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a symbol attributes instance that loads the specified attributes.

params.name: AttributesFile
params.doc: The filename of the attributes file.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

methods.name: LoadAttributes
methods.summary: Loads the attributes from the attribute file.

params.name: attributeFile
params.doc: The filename of the attribute file.

returns.doc: True if the attributes are loaded correctly. False if the attribute file loading failed.

properties.name: Angle
properties.summary: The angle of the symbol. Cannot be changed for an editor-created symbol when the symbol is created "along line".

properties.name: Color
properties.summary: The symbol color. Does not have an effect on symbols where the color is already defined in the symbol file.

properties.name: PreferredPlacing
properties.summary: The type of placing the object should use. See the preferred placing types for different types of placing.

properties.name: TrueColor
properties.summary: The true color (RGB enabled) of the symbol. Does not have an effect on symbols where the color is already defined in the symbol file.
